title: EXPUNGEMENT CLINIC - 211info
text: YOUTH, RIGHTS & JUSTICE EXPUNGEMENT CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with expungement of juvenile criminal records. 1785 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 300 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Individuals with juvenile court convictions which were committed in the state of Oregon Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Criminal Record Expungement Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - FAMILY DEFENSE PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH, RIGHTS & JUSTICE
